title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Sign a Deed of Donation (DOD) to Accept and Receive for and in Favor of the Municipal Government of Los Baños Two (2) Units of Used Service Vehicles From Ecosystem Research and Development Bureau (ERDB) and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR: HON. JANOS S. LAPIZ, 02/22/2021)
